visual_observations.composition_style: ingredient spotlight — mint oil as hero ingredient

text_overlays.content_summary: زيت النعناع — mint oil ingredient featured as key plumping ingredient in Mira Lip Shine

notable_visual_elements: ingredient-hero format — mint shown as natural plumper
clean/natural aesthetic signals B Corp/clean beauty values
mint = freshness + natural = clean beauty positioning

voice_observations.caption_text:
مرايا ليب شاين غني بمكونات محفزة وزيت النعناع ليمنح الشفاه امتلاءً طبيعياً، مع ترطيب وإحساس منعش عند التطبيق.

Maraya Lip Shine is infused with stimulating actives and spearmint oil to create a subtle plumping effect, while delivering hydration and a refreshing cooling sensation on application
voice_observations.hook_text: مرايا ليب شاين غني بمكونات محفزة

cultural_notes.free_notes: Ingredient transparency is a key clean beauty brand signal. Asteri being Saudi-origin B Corp certified means ingredient stories are credibility pillars — 'why it works' content for informed consumers.

pattern_matches.notes: Ingredient hero (mint oil) rather than finished product — educational
Clean ingredient story — B Corp brand values made tangible
